Operation 'unpauseUser' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_side_effects, not_actionable. Current description is passive and unclear about the operation's effect. It doesn't explain what happens when unpaused or what the precondition means for the operation's outcome. Improved description clarifies the action (resumes conversation assignment), the precondition (user must be paused), and the side effect (user becomes eligible for new assignments).

data.current_description: Will only be un-paused if they are currently paused
data.description_suggestion: Resumes conversation assignment for a paused user. The operation only succeeds if the user is currently in a paused state. Once unpaused, the user will be eligible to receive new conversation assignments again.
data.reasoning: Current description is passive and unclear about the operation's effect. It doesn't explain what happens when unpaused or what the precondition means for the operation's outcome. Improved description clarifies the action (resumes conversation assignment), the precondition (user must be paused), and the side effect (user becomes eligible for new assignments).
